name: Quick Macaroons
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease cookie sheets lightly.
3. Combine shredded coconut, sweetened condensed milk, and vanilla extract in a bowl until well mixed.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto the prepared cookie sheets about 1 inch apart.
5. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until delicately browned.
Note: For less waste, double the amount of coconut and flavoring, using a full can of condensed milk. For variety, color the coconut with food coloring before combining it with the milk.
